requestId.description: Unique code that identifies a change order request.

workflowId.description: Code that identifies the transaction of changing the orders in the [order flow](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/order-flow-and-status--tutorials_196).

reason.description: Reason that motivated the order change.
reason.example: The client wants to change the items weight.

manualDiscountValue.description: This field shows if a manual price was applied to the total order amount. The value is in cents.

manualIncrementValue.description: This field shows if an increment value was applied to the total order amount. The value is in cents.

totalChangeValue.description: This field shows how much the order total price is considering that price changes might have been made. The value is in cents.

totals.description: Array containing information about change prices per item.

add.description: Array with information about the `add` operation, when applicable. The schema will correspond to the object `to` inside the `replace` array.

remove.description: Array with information about the `remove` operation, when applicable. The schema will correspond to the object `from` inside the `replace` array.

replace.description: Array with information about the `replace` operation, when applicable.

date.description: Date and time of the request. The value is in UTC ISO 8601 format `yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss.sssZ`.
